step_rationale: Upregulated ACS biomarker; acyl-carnitine reflecting dysregulated β-oxidation.
mechanism: Isobutyryl-L-carnitine elevation in ACS indicates impaired myocardial fatty-acid oxidation and energy crisis.

references.title: Urinary metabonomic study of patients with acute coronary syndrome using UPLC-QTOF/MS.
references.journal: Journal of chromatography. B, Analytical technologies in the biomedical and life sciences
